code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut evens = ""
  mut odds = ""
  mut first_e = true
  mut first_o = true
  for tok in tokens
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if n % 2 == 0
        if first_e
          evens = "#{n}"
          first_e = false
        else
          evens = "#{evens} #{n}"
        end
      else
        if first_o
          odds = "#{n}"
          first_o = false
        else
          odds = "#{odds} #{n}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  println("evens=#{evens}")
  println("odds=#{odds}")
end
